title: Harden AI Cockpit and release preflight gates before final publication

sources.reason: The local skill is the procedural entry point that must carry the hard preflight rules.
The plan defines serial Work Item lifecycle and release completion requirements.

sources.path: gh pr 267, gh pr 268, gh pr 269
sources.reason: Actual PR failures demonstrated cross-branch Work Item mixing, archive mutation after digest binding, and required-check timing.

rawUserRequest: 将本轮暴露的流程问题固化到 ai-cockpit skill，并增加硬性的事前检查，尽量在下一步实施、PR 和 CI 之前阻断问题；修改完成后再进行版本发布确认。

declaredIntent.summary: Turn the observed lifecycle, PR ownership, archive freeze, and release readiness failures into fail-closed preflight checks and skill instructions.

riskAssessment.reason: Initial skeleton; replace with task-specific implementation and review risks.

executionDecision.reason: The requested hardening has concrete failure evidence and a bounded implementation scope.

preReviewWarnings: Review fail-closed behavior for wrong base, multiple Work Items, active Work Items, and digest drift.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The ai-cockpit skill explicitly requires lifecycle, PR ownership, archive freeze, and release preflight gates before implementation or publication.
A repository check fails closed when the release source tree is not frozen, archive digest is stale, or active Work Items remain.
A repository check fails closed when a PR contains more than one newly maintained Work Item or is based on a non-default Work Item branch.
Unit tests cover passing and failing preflight scenarios, and the Work Item completes the full lifecycle.
guidelines: Fail closed before expensive CI/PR work when deterministic local evidence is insufficient.
Keep the skill instructions and executable repository checks behaviorally aligned.

intent.problem: The current process allowed release digest binding before the final archive tree, allowed a PR derived from another unmerged Work Item, and relied on late CI to reveal archive budget drift.
constraints: Do not weaken existing gates or accept chat-only evidence.
Keep checks deterministic and runnable before PR creation where possible.
Do not publish or modify release metadata in this Work Item.
intent.rationale: The observed failures are procedural and should be blocked at the earliest deterministic boundary, before repeated CI and PR cycles.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: stale digest or active Work Item
PR with two Work Items or wrong base

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized hardening the skill and pre-release gates before publication.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
